description_long: This is a light pink casual sneaker with a rounded toe and a low-cut ankle collar. The upper appears to be made of a soft, fabric-like material, with subtle stitching details along the sides and around the lace eyelets. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with three visible eyelets on each side, and the laces are made of matching pink material. The sole is thick, textured, and made of a white rubber-like material, providing both cushioning and grip. The interior is softly padded, suggesting comfort for everyday wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the overall design is minimalistic and clean.
description: A light pink, low-cut sneaker with a soft fabric upper, standard laces, and a thick white rubber sole. The design is minimalistic and comfortable, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the subtle stitching, low-cut ankle, and the thick, textured sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar and the back seam, with the sole wrapping around the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same stitching and sole details, with a clear view of the lace area.
